site.name: NAHIMS SW
site.fullName: National Association of Health Information Management Students

events.title: Pad A Girl Initiative
events.description: The Pad A Girl Initiative is a menstrual hygiene outreach programme that provides free sanitary products and reproductive health education to underprivileged female students across the Southwest Zone. Led by Comrade Waheed Aliyat Olajumoke, this initiative has touched the lives of over 500 female students across our chapters.
events.fullContent:
The Pad A Girl Initiative stands as one of NAHIMS SW's most impactful social responsibility programmes. Under the passionate leadership of Comrade Waheed Aliyat Olajumoke, the initiative distributed free sanitary pads and educated young women on menstrual hygiene management.

The 2024 edition reached 6 chapters across the Southwest, impacting over 500 girls. Health information management students took the lead in conducting health talks, recording data, and ensuring every participant received adequate support.

This initiative embodies the NAHIMS SW spirit: using our health information expertise not just in hospitals, but in communities where it matters most.

events.title: Onboard3 Web3 Meetup OSCOHEALTH
events.description: A groundbreaking technology event exploring the intersection of digital innovation. Hosted by Comrade Abdulfatah Abdullahi, the summit featured live demos of web3, blockchain workshops, and presentations by industry professionals.
events.fullContent:
The Onboard3 Web3 Meetup OSCOHEALTH 2026, conceptualised and executed by Comrade Abdulfatah Abdullahi, marked a new era for NAHIMS SW's engagement with technology.

The summit brought together over 100 students and 2 industry professionals to explore how technology is reshaping health information management in Nigeria. Sessions covered web3, blockchai, ai  and career pathways in health informatics.

Comrade Abdulfatah's vision was clear: 'As future HIM professionals, we must be technology-first thinkers. The hospitals of tomorrow will run on systems we understand better than anyone.'

events.title: Onboard3 Web3 Meetup UITH
events.description: A hands-on workshop on web3, mobile health applications, and money making in web3. The first tech event hosted by Comrade Abdulfatah Abdullahi focused on practical skills that students can apply immediately in clinical settings.
events.fullContent:
Following the massive success of the HIM Tech Summit, Comrade Abdulfatah Abdullahi returned with an even more practical offering: the Web3 Innovation Workshop.

Held at UITH, the full-day workshop divided participants into practical tracks: a web3 phase , a mobile health app development intro session, and a blockchain data privacy masterclass led by a blockchain expert from the University of Ilorin.

Over 180 students attended, with 95% rating the event 'excellent' in post-event surveys. Several participants reported securing internships with health tech companies as a direct result of connections made at the workshop.

events.title: NAHIMS SW Annual Convention 2026
events.organizer: Past President Comrade Ajayi Abiodun Greatness
events.description: The landmark annual convention hosted under the administration of Past President Comrade Ajayi Abiodun Greatness. A five-day event that brought together all 15 chapters, featured the educative program, fun and networking sessions and executive elections.
events.fullContent:
Under the visionary leadership of Past President Comrade Ajayi Abiodun Greatness, the 2026NAHIMS SW Annual Convention became the most impactful in the association's history.

Held at the historic campus of College of Health Tech Akure , the five-day convention drew over 100 delegates from all 15 Southwest chapters. Key highlights included:

- Educational Session: High Keynote speaker were invited to speak about Politics, Tech and Training
- Executive Elections: The current executive team was democratically elected
- Sport Tournament: A football competition was organized during the convention
- Gyration and Cultural Night: A celebration of the diverse cultures across the seven Southwest states

Comrade Ajayi Abiodun Greatness left an enduring legacy, transforming NAHIMS SW into a stronger, more organised, and more impactful association.

news.title: NAHIMS SW Annual Due 2026/2027  – Registration Open
news.author: Admin
news.excerpt: The 2026/2027 annual due registration is open and all chapters are advised to start making payment.
news.content: The 2026/2027 annual dues registration is now open. All chapters are advised to begin payment processing and complete their registrations within the stipulated period. Chapters should ensure that payments are made promptly to maintain good standing and access all benefits, programs, and activities for the new session.

news.title: 2025 Annual Due Payment Notice
news.author: Financial Secretary
news.excerpt: All chapters are reminded to pay their 2025 annual dues before April 31, 2027.
news.content: All NAHIMS SW chapters are hereby notified to complete payment of their 2027 annual dues on or before April 31, 2027. Failure to pay will result in suspension of chapter privileges including voting rights at the 2027 summit. Payment status is tracked on the Chapters page.
